en.%setting_currentUser_description%: Your name as it appears in task assignments (e.g. Noel, Johan, Anysa)
en.%setting_projectsBasePath_description%: Path to the folder containing Paratext project directories
en.%setting_gcalClientId_description%: OAuth 2.0 Client ID from Google Cloud Console (Desktop app credentials)
en.%setting_gcalClientSecret_description%: OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from Google Cloud Console
en.%setting_gcalCalendarId_description%: Calendar ID to sync deadlines to (default: primary)
en.%setting_gcalAccessToken_description%: Managed automatically by the extension — do not edit manually
en.%setting_gcalRefreshToken_description%: Managed automatically by the extension — do not edit manually
en.%setting_gcalTokenExpiry_description%: Managed automatically by the extension — do not edit manually
en.%setting_gcalLastSync_description%: Timestamp of the last successful deadline sync
en.%setting_gcalUserEmail_description%: Email of the connected Google account

es.%setting_currentUser_description%: Tu nombre como aparece en las asignaciones de tareas (ej. Noel, Johan, Anysa)
es.%setting_projectsBasePath_description%: Ruta a la carpeta que contiene los directorios de proyectos de Paratext
es.%setting_gcalClientId_description%: Client ID OAuth 2.0 de Google Cloud Console (credenciales de aplicación de escritorio)
es.%setting_gcalClientSecret_description%: Client Secret OAuth 2.0 de Google Cloud Console
es.%setting_gcalCalendarId_description%: ID del calendario donde se sincronizan las fechas límite (por defecto: primary)
es.%setting_gcalAccessToken_title%: Token de Acceso de Google Calendar
es.%setting_gcalRefreshToken_title%: Token de Actualización de Google Calendar
es.%setting_gcalTokenExpiry_title%: Expiración del Token de Google Calendar
es.%setting_gcalLastSync_description%: Fecha y hora de la última sincronización exitosa de fechas límite
es.%setting_gcalUserEmail_description%: Correo de la cuenta de Google conectada
